name: /plugin-install clones the github org slash repo via gh and validates the plugin.yaml manifest before any registration occurs
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/example && printf 'name: example
rules:
  - id: foo
    detector: rubric/detectors/foo.sh
' > stub-clones/acme/example/plugin.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/example --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'gh_clone=acme/example' out.txt && grep -q 'plugin_yaml_validated=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
